source_pr.title: ddl: migrate test-infra to testify for ddl.testDBSuite4

symptoms: - c.Skip("skip race test") | tk.MustGetErrCode("CREATE TABLE t (a INT , b INT as (ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a)))", errno.ErrWindowInvalidWindowFuncUse) (ddl/db_test.go)
failure_signature: - c.Skip("skip race test") | tk.MustGetErrCode("CREATE TABLE t (a INT , b INT as (ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a)))", errno.ErrWindowInvalidWindowFuncUse) (ddl/db_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates part of the DDL test suite from legacy gocheck-style suites to testify. Framework migration can reduce flaky suite lifecycle / fixture issues and is often used to improve stability of previously skipped unstable race tests.
fix_pattern: Migrate legacy gocheck-based DDL tests to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.
